title: Campus partnership → visible posting
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Campus partnership → visible posting

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Open Campus Partnerships / Select campus
steps.observe: Campus list and request/connect actions visible

steps.label: Send partnership request to target campus (if not already approved) — manual step
steps.observe: Request submitted; status shows pending/requested Complete this on screen during the recording pause.

steps.label: Open Employer Partnership Requests
steps.observe: Employer's request appears; approve action available

steps.label: Approve the partnership request — manual step
steps.observe: Status becomes approved/active Complete this on screen during the recording pause.

steps.label: Employer logs in — revisit campus partnerships
steps.observe: Campus shows approved/active on employer side

steps.label: Employer logs in — revisit campus partnerships (continued)
steps.observe: Campus shows approved/active on employer side

steps.label: Open Internship Programs to create a campus posting
steps.observe: Employer can publish internship visible after college approval.

steps.label: Navigate to Internship Programs
steps.observe: Post Internship form and published list.

steps.label: College opens Internships and Programs — manual approve
steps.observe: Switch to List view; Approve for campus on pending GT- or new posting.

steps.label: Open college Internships list
steps.observe: Pending review row visible for employer posting.

steps.label: Approve for campus — manual
steps.observe: Campus column shows Approved; students can browse after this.

steps.label: Student browses internships
steps.observe: Approved posting visible when eligibility matches.

steps.label: Open Browse Internships
steps.observe: Same posting title appears for eligible student.
